title: Animated Programmer Art Foliage
description: Adds animations for all the vanilla leaves, grass, ferns, and vines. Programmer art style.
body:
This resource pack adds animated textures for all the following; leaves, grass, ferns, and vines. It uses programmer art assets up until the point where they were discontinued, and from there onwards it re-uses older assets with minor edits (e.g. propagules in mangrove leaves & blossoms in azalea leaves).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Gpnvl_TUPZs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you intend to use this pack, be sure to turn mipmaps levels either down or off entirely, as high levels make many animated textures extremely performance-heavy.

This pack was designed to be used alongside [Vintage](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vintage): Programmer Art Remade by RedPierre. If you plan to use it with vintage, please place this pack above all others in the selection screen.

If you would like to join the discord server dedicated to my projects, please message me on discord @gravitybreacher for an invite.

You are more than welcome to use this in your modpacks, though credit would be appreciated.
